game.short_text: How many rejections can you rack up before getting kicked out?
game.title: Don't Stare

details.title: Don't Stare
details.description:
Follow us to see what's next: Bluesky
Hover and hold your cursor over your date's weak spot. Stare long enough, and they will get uncomfortable and flee. 
No need to click during the Speed Dating, a gaze does more than action. See how many rejections you can rack up in 20 seconds.
Pay attention to anomalies in the mix. What makes them self-conscious may not be what you first think.
Created By
Gabe M Carvalho - Code, Sound, VFX
Owen Melisek - Art, Music
An Ozone Soft Production

details.title: Who is Ayame?
details.description:
Who is Ayame?
Who is Ayame...?
Who is....Ayame?
Ayame?
?

Depending on your decisions, you'll affect Naru's and Ayame's future.
The game currently contains 7 endings. You have to find them yourself. 

Ending 1 Hint: Something platonic.
Click to see word. "Friend".

Ending 2 Hint: Something not so platonic (feeling).
Click to see word. "Love" or "Crush".

Ending 3 Hint: Something NOT platonic.
Click to see word. "Wife" or "Bride".

Ending 4 Hint: Something...nurturing?
Click to see word. "Mom" or "Mother".

Ending 5 Hint: Something full.
Click to see word. "Everything".

Ending 6 Hint: Something empty.
Click to see word. "Nothing".

Ending 7 Hint (Best Ending): The simplest answer.
Click to see word. "Ayame" or "You".

(I might update the game over time to add new endings.)
